question: Did the model output '5 pairs' or select Option A as the final answer?
Does the generated image depict a triangle ABC that is visually isosceles (with AB ≈ AC)?
In the generated image, is point D located visually at the midpoint of segment BC?
Are the line segments AD and EF clearly drawn as straight lines connecting their respective endpoints?
Are all vertices and key points (A, B, C, D, E, F, and G if used) clearly and correctly labeled in the image?
Are the perpendicular lines DE and DF drawn such that E lies on segment AB and F lies on segment AC (not on extensions), with visual perpendicularity or right-angle markers?
If the model identifies the intersection point of AD and EF (e.g., G), is it correctly marked at the geometric intersection in the image?
Does the figure maintain the expected bilateral symmetry about the axis AD?
Did the model correctly identify the congruence of the large triangles △ABD and △ACD?
Did the model use valid criteria (e.g., SSS with AB=AC, BD=CD, AD common) to justify the congruence of △ABD and △ACD?
Did the model correctly identify the congruence of the triangles formed by the perpendiculars, △AED and △AFD?
Did the model correctly derive that DE = DF (e.g., via angle bisector property or congruence of △AED/△AFD) or that AD bisects ∠BAC?
Did the model correctly identify the congruence of the bottom corner triangles, △BED and △CFD?
Did the model correctly identify the congruence of the internal triangles formed by the intersection of AD and EF (e.g., △AEG ≌ △AFG)?
Did the model correctly identify the congruence of the smaller internal triangles formed by the intersection (e.g., △DEG ≌ △DFG)?
Did the model avoid claiming false congruent pairs or using invalid congruence criteria?
Do the labels used in the text reasoning (especially for the intersection point G) exactly match the labels present in the generated image?
Does the generated image accurately reflect the text description of perpendiculars (DE⊥AB, DF⊥AC) with appropriate visual placement?
Are there any contradictions between the text description and the image (e.g., text says AB=AC but image shows clearly unequal sides)?
